creator: rssh@cki.ipri.kiev.ua
text:
xrus install his C locale, over native X11R6, and have entry in
   PLIST for it.
   So, after pkg_delete xrus-3.2 C locale also deleted.

   Yet another problem -- when xrus installed, with  any LANG, which differs
   from C or ru_SU.KOI8-R, X don't want start. 
for Andrey Chernov:
   Eto chto, borba za chistotu russkogo unixa ? ;)

Fix: 

better backup all
 native X11 files, than restore.
How-To-Repeat: 
 if you have xrus installed:
 pkg_delete xrus-3.2
